summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sistema de Inventario MVP new features: Reports page with statistics/charts, CSV/PDF export functionality, and Sales History with date/status filters. All major functionality working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height)
ui_bugs.impact: Charts render correctly but show console warnings

passed_tests: Backend API: All 26 tests passed including new reports endpoints
Reports page loads with statistics cards ($51 revenue, 1 transaction, $51 avg ticket)
Daily sales bar chart displays correctly with data
Payment methods pie chart renders properly
Top products list shows sales data (Producto Test 164846, 2 units, $51)
Export CSV downloads file with correct filename (ventas_2026-04-08.csv)
Export PDF downloads file with correct filename (ventas_2026-04-08.pdf)
Date filters work for export (start/end date inputs functional)
Sales history page loads with proper filters section
Sales history filters by status (completada/anulada/todas) working
Apply filters button triggers filtered results correctly
Clear filters resets to all sales properly
Summary cards update based on filters (showing 0 when no matching sales)
Navigation between Reports and Sales History pages working
Login functionality with admin credentials working
